docs_page_foundations_header_paragraph: Foundations define the user experiences. These include our tokens, guidelines, and visual styles: color, spacing, typography, and more.
docs_page_card_for_developers_descriptio: Get started with setting up the environment.
docs_page_card_for_content_designers_des: Get started with content design guidelines.
docs_page_card_for_designers_description: Get started with UI design guidelines.
docs_page_card_components_description: View the components to build Davidnet interfaces with.
docs_page_card_tools_description: Utilities and resources for working with the design system.
docs_page_header_paragraph: Create modulair and accessible interfaces with the DDS!
docs_page_design_tokens_header_paragraph: Design tokens are the single source of truth to name and store design decisions.
docs_page_foundations_card_design_tokens: Design tokens are the single source of truth to name and store design decisions.
docs_page_design_tokens_library_header_p: This page shows all design tokens.
docs_page_components_card_anchor_descrip: An anchor is a primitive component for building custom links.
docs_page_components_card_appshell_descr: A top level wrapper for the Design System.
docs_page_components_card_avatar_descrip: An avatar is a visual representation of a user or entity.
docs_page_components_card_flex_descripti: Flex is a primitive layout component that implements the CSS Flexbox API.
docs_page_components_card_icon_descripti: An icon is a symbol representing a command, device, directory, or common action.
docs_page_components_card_codesnippet_de: A premium theme-aware code snippet viewer with syntax highlighting and copy support.
docs_page_components_card_button_descrip: The most used component for interacting with an page.
docs_page_components_card_checkbox_descr: A checkbox allows selecting one or more items.
docs_page_components_card_dropdown_descr: A dropdown displays a list of options for selection.
docs_page_components_card_iconbutton_des: An icon button is a button containing only an icon.
docs_page_components_card_iconlinkbutton: An icon link button is a link styled as a button with an icon.
docs_page_components_card_linkbutton_des: A link button is a link styled as a button.
docs_page_components_card_textarea_descr: A textarea allows entering multi-line text.
docs_page_components_card_textfield_desc: A textfield allows entering single-line text.
docs_page_components_card_skeleton_descr: A skeleton displays a placeholder preview during loading.
docs_page_components_card_spinner_descri: A spinner indicates an ongoing loading state.
docs_page_components_card_banner_descrip: A banner displays prominent system messages at the top.
docs_page_components_card_keyboardtip_de: A keyboard tip displays shortcut keys.
docs_page_components_card_modal_descript: A modal dialog overlays the primary window.
docs_page_components_card_toast_descript: A toast displays short, temporary feedback messages.
docs_page_components_card_toaster_descri: A toaster manages and displays active toasts.
docs_page_components_card_visuallyhidden: Hides elements visually while keeping them accessible to screen readers.
docs_page_components_card_blanket_descri: A blanket dims the background behind overlay components.
docs_page_components_card_tooltip_descri: A tooltip displays helpful information on hover.
docs_page_foundations_content_header_par: Content covers voice and tone, style, grammar, and punctuation. Craft clear, concise, and conversational language to help people get where they need to go.
docs_sidebar_shortcut_close_description: Closes the sidebar navigation on tiny screens
docs_page_tools_card_llm_resources_descr: Let AI write code that fits with our system design.
docs_page_llm_resources_header_paragraph: Let AI write code that fits with our system design.
docs_page_llm_resources_card_gemini_gem_: Gemini gem that already contains all the System Context files and custom instructions.
docs_page_simulation_header_paragraph: Explore each aspect of the design system individually.
docs_page_simulation_too_small_screen_wa: Your device screen is too small to run the simulation environment. Please use a larger screen or resize your browser window to continue.
docs_page_simulation_preparing_environme: Hang thight, we are preparing the simulation environment.
docs_page_simulation_runner_sandbox_warn: Sandbox mode. Do not enter any sensitive information.
docs_page_simulation_runner_ready: Ready to simulate. Select a component.
docs_page_exit_paragraph_1: This link is taking you to an website that is not controlled or operated by us.
docs_page_exit_paragraph_2: We are not responsible for the content or availability of external sites.
